hero.title: Good Morning
hero.pitch: Lifestyle e-commerce site offering limited-edition items every morning. This project covers mockup design exclusively in mobile format.

designSystemShowcase.title: Design System & Code
designSystemShowcase.intro: Sample Tailwind / CSS token setup for the mobile project (reference file — not executed on this page).

architecture.title: Information architecture
architecture.description: Navigation and content structure for a clear mobile shopping path: catalog, product page, and checkout flow.

wireframes.title: Structure & ergonomics
wireframes.description: Low-fi wireframes to validate hierarchy, tap targets, and readability on small screens before art direction.

da.title: Art direction
da.description: Minimal, high-contrast graphic exploration for a lifestyle identity aligned with limited-edition drops.

designSystem.title: Design system & guidelines
designSystem.description: Turning the graphic charter into CSS tokens for technical consistency.
